title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners:
Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners!
